name: sgs/product-card
title: Product Card
description: Product card with pack-size variant pills, price and CTA. Typed mode = built-in elements authored directly from block attributes (no InnerBlocks). Live product data mode = render a live WooCommerce or SGS product (price, image, stock, add-to-cart) through the SGS design.

featuredTag.description: Tag text for featured variant (e.g. Most popular, Best selling, Flagship product). Mirror of trialTag for the featured variant. Rendered as a coloured strip above the card content when variantStyle='featured'.

cardMaxWidth.description: Override the card max-width (e.g. 320px, 100%). Empty = use theme default (380px). Sets --sgs-product-card-max-width inline.

imageHeight.description: Override the product image box height (e.g. 180px, 16rem). Empty = use theme default (220px). Sets --sgs-product-card-image-height inline.

innerPadding.description: Inner padding of the card body (ContainerWrapperControls content-kind Spacing panel). A numeric spacing-preset slug (e.g. "40") resolves to var(--wp--preset--spacing--40); a raw CSS length (e.g. "24px") is emitted directly. Empty = theme default (20px). Sets --sgs-product-card-inner-padding inline.

indexVariationUrl.description: FR-27-E2 escape-hatch: set to a variation ID to override the page canonical URL to that variation's URL, enabling it to be indexed. 0 = default (WP core canonical, recommended).

framingMode.description: Spec 28 P1 (FR-28-8): how the comparative value-ladder frames the per-unit saving. loss-aversion = 'save Xp each vs …'; savings = 'save X%'; neutral = no saving text. Placement-level (a card block renders many products).

decoyEnabled.description: Spec 28 P1 (FR-28-9a): when true, the 'Best value' badge targets the 2nd-largest pack (decoy) instead of the largest. In live-data mode the per-product meta _sgs_decoy_enabled overrides this.

headingLevel.description: HTML heading level for the product title in typed built-in mode (h2, h3, or h4).

ctaBehaviour.description: Primary CTA behaviour in bound mode. 'learn-more' = plain link. 'add-to-basket' = SGS cart proxy add. 'buy-now' = add then redirect to WC checkout. Typed mode always renders plain links regardless of this setting.

ctaStyle.description: Primary CTA visual style — maps to btn-{ctaStyle} class (matches existing btn-primary / btn-secondary vocabulary in style.css).

cta2Text.description: Secondary CTA label. Empty string = no secondary button rendered.

cta2Style.description: Secondary CTA visual style — maps to btn-{cta2Style} class.

visibleAxes.description: Bound mode only: taxonomy slugs of attribute axes to show in the option picker. Empty array = show all axes. Display filter only — never alters the seeded context or manifest.

overrideElements.description: Connected (bound) mode only: which card elements render the operator's typed value instead of the live product value. Members: 'name','description','badge','image','cta'. An element's typed value is preserved when its override is off; an empty typed value never blanks the card (live value renders). PRICE IS NEVER OVERRIDABLE (page-schema-feed parity) - deliberately not an enum member.

showLadder.description: Show the comparative per-pack price ladder. The grid block sets this false on its cards by default - browsing context shows just price + per-item note.

attributes.description: Baked fresh every week and posted the same day.
